setup_task.sh explicitly hardcodes these target parameter values into the swarm_spec_sheet.txt

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated drone commissioning instructions explicitly written to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/swarm_spec_sheet.txt by setup_task.sh. The required parameters strictly align with the specifications provided in the text file, demanding specific values for SYSID_THISMAV (42.0), FS_THR_ENABLE (3.0), FS_GCS_ENABLE (0.0), BATT_FS_LOW_ACT (1.0), FENCE_ACTION (2.0), FENCE_RADIUS (150.0), FENCE_ALT_MAX (120.0), and NTF_LED_TYPES (255.0). All target output paths such as the params export file and sign-off report are consistently requested by the task instructions.
